Message to visitors:

When you visit our park, please think about the animals still living in the wild. They need to search for natural foods such as seeds and nuts. Even the smallest piece of bread or snack food can disrupt their diet and health. Tractors and donors should not feed. Feeding not only disrupts the health of our ecosystem but it can also affect the balance in our population. Please use the bins provided and do not leave food on the ground.

Thank you for keeping our park clean and helping us protect the natural balance.
payload.stem: What is the main purpose of this message?

payload.passage:
Message to visitors:

When you visit our park, please think about the animals still living in the wild. They need to search for natural foods such as seeds and nuts. Even the smallest piece of bread or snack food can disrupt their diet and health. Tractors and donors should not feed. Feeding not only disrupts the health of our ecosystem but it can also affect the balance in our population. Please use the bins provided and do not leave food on the ground.

Thank you for keeping our park clean and helping us protect the natural balance.
payload.stem: What mistakes do some people make?

payload.passage:
"Studies show..." — how often we hear that phrase, followed by a statement presented as fact. But what does it really mean? It seems that technology can both raise and destroy reputations. More and more, we find that technology has overpowered common sense. Platforms and restaurant experiments really easily are reviewed, and we question what has long been established anecdotes.

In this week's episode of Science Today, we will investigate the role technology plays in our day-to-day decisions. Can technology always determine the best way to act? Don't miss Paige to tell us his findings from several notable studies. Guest speakers on both sides of the issue will share their own vision and tenacity.
payload.stem: What is the best meaning of the first sentence?

options.text: Studies prove how to live better.
Science has an effect on behaviour.
